message:
chore(deps): update Cargo dependencies and beads issue metadata

Cargo.toml:
- Enable "cursor" and "opencode" features on franken-agent-detection
  dependency to match the connector extraction refactor.

Cargo.lock:
- Downgrade windows-sys 0.61.2 -> 0.60.2 (lockfile resolution)
- Downgrade thiserror 2.0.18 -> 1.0.69 for coding_agent_search crate
- Bump frankensearch-embed 0.1.1 -> 0.1.2
- Add rusqlite and urlencoding to franken-agent-detection deps
- Switch franken-agent-detection from base64 0.13.1 -> 0.22.1

Beads:
- Update issue tracker with new and closed issues reflecting the
  connector extraction, search migration annotations, and UI fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
